problem id: 4732c53f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01101110 -> 00001001
  11010100 -> 00010111
  00101000 -> 11101011
  01110011 -> 00100111
  10100110 -> 01101110
  10010100 -> 00110111
  10100111 -> 11001110
  01000101 -> 11111101
  00100001 -> 01001111
  00111010 -> 10100010

query: 10101011
predicted answer: 01001010
